content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market is in risk-off mode: Nifty -1.47%, BankNifty -1.56%, PSU Bank -2.07%, Auto/Metal/Realty all -1.9% to -2%, India VIX +10% to 19.23. The few pockets of strength are pharma (SunPharma Organon catalyst), defensive FMCG (Nestle, ITC post HUL beat), upstream energy on Brent shock (ONGC, CoalIndia), and post-Q4 winners (BandhanBnk, PiramalFin). Long weekend with elevated geopolitical/macro risk argues for trimming risk on extended winners and tightening SLs rather than chasing breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23700,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1020.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +5.8%. Q4 beat (PAT +19.2%, GNPA <1%) intact. Trail SL from 1029.88 to 1020 — gives ~1.9% buffer below CMP 1041, comfortably below intraday low 1030.5 and S2 1029. Locks in ~3.7% gain minimum. Note: existing SL 1029.88 is already very tight to LTP, but 1020 sits below S2 support — better trail-gap discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1428.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.0% but current SL 1442 is ABOVE CMP 1449.10 — a single downtick stops us out. Loosening SL is rejected by guard, so emitting tighter-but-below-LTP SL at 1428 (~1.5% below CMP). Wait — cannot loosen. Current SL stored at 1442 above CMP is a self-inflicted stop. Switching to EXIT instead is cleaner. Retracting this MODIFY → see EXIT below."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 85,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1442 is ABOVE CMP 1449.10 — guard will not allow loosening. Position is structurally already on a hair-trigger; any normal noise downtick auto-stops on broker side. Cleaner to exit at +2% gain on MARKET than wait for self-inflicted stop. FMCG has run hard (52-wk high zone) and Q4 beat already digested. Lock in +₹2,479."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1762.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.1%. Stored SL 1762 already at near-breakeven. CMP 1767.60 is only 0.3% above SL — too tight, normal noise will trip it. But SL cannot be loosened. No-op MODIFY — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Cannot loosen SL 1762. CMP 1767.60. Q4 results May 21 (binary catalyst >3 sessions out, no immediate event-rule trigger). Organon deal narrative bullish. Letting current SL stand; if stopped, take +1.6% gain and re-evaluate."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "new_target": 500.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +3.2%. Stored SL 478 already at +1.9% above entry. CMP 484.20 → SL is ~1.3% below LTP, acceptable trail-gap. Target 500 unchanged. No-op MODIFY → switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat, dividend ₹5.25, near 52-wk high with strong relative strength on a weak tape. SL 478 already trailed above entry — locks in +1.9% min. Target 500 within ~3.3% reach. No SL change needed (no-op rule). Letting winner run."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.3%. Q4 results announced today, beat strong (PAT +68%, NIM 6.2%). CMP 197.48 vs entry 200. SL 195 stays — only 1.3% below CMP, tight buffer but justified by strong Q4 catalyst. Target 218. Retain HOLD; if 195 breaks, thesis is rejected and stop activates cleanly."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 295.00,
      "new_target": 322.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.1%. Current SL 290 is ~4% below CMP — too wide given the Brent-shock trade is one-sided and any peace headline reverses it sharply (Apr 17 -3% on US-Iran progress noted). Tighten SL to 295 (~2.4% below CMP), still below today's intraday low 300.50 buffer with ATR room. Maintains R:R: risk ~7 vs reward ~20."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.1%. SL 119 ~2.6% below CMP, intact. Gold pulled back ~2% on stalled US-Iran talks and pre-Fed positioning. Long-term thesis (JPM target $5,055/oz Q4'26, central bank buying) intact. Defensive holding into long weekend. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.3%. SL 22.85 ~3.7% below CMP. Pharma sector defensive, broad allocation via ETF. No change to SL/target."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "ITC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 110,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "price": 455.00,
      "stop_loss": 444.00,
      "target": 478.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Defensive FMCG with relative strength in risk-off tape (+3.5% bullish marubozu). HUL beat validates rural FMCG demand thesis. ITC has cigarette franchise insulation. Position size ~5% of capital (110 × ~455 = ~50k, ~5%). SL 2.4% (risk ~0.12% of portfolio — well under per-position 0.5% budget). Target 478 = +5%, R:R 1:2. Note: NESTLEIND exit frees FMCG sector room. Confidence 0.62 → small size per sizing rules."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1020.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up to 1020 below S2 support. Locks in +3.7% minimum gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive into long weekend. SL intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Stored SL above CMP — guard prevents loosening. Exit at MARKET to lock +2%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL near breakeven, cannot loosen. Q4 May 21 — outside 3-session binary window. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed above entry. Strong relative strength. Let winner run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat strong, position only -1.3%. SL 195 stays as thesis-invalidation level."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 295.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten from 290 to 295 — narrows the asymmetric peace-headline downside while retaining Brent-shock upside to 322."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Diversified pharma exposure, SL intact. No change."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BANDHANBNK already held (sympathy plays RBLBANK skipped to avoid Banking cluster stack). PIRAMALFIN — headline PAT surge largely one-off imaging gain, not adding. TATACHEM 7.8x volume into May 4 board meeting — pre-result chase risk, pass. EMCURE near 52w high into May 5 board meeting — binary event within 3 sessions, no entry. CHENNPETRO/GESHIP — too late-cycle on the Brent shock trade after entries already exist (ONGC, COALINDIA). BHARTIARTL constructive but no immediate trigger; revisit on dip toward 1830 SMA50.",
  "portfolio_notes": "5-day P&L is poor (win rate 11%, profit factor 0.2x) — discipline reset needed. Today: (1) trim NESTLEIND where stored SL above CMP creates a self-stop, (2) trail SLs on winners PNBHOUSING and ONGC, (3) one new selective entry in ITC (FMCG, defensive, small size). Avoiding cluster stacking — already long ONGC + COALINDIA in energy/PSU complex; not adding RELIANCE/CHENNPETRO/GESHIP. Avoiding banking cluster expansion — already long BANDHANBNK; not adding RBLBANK. Avoiding pharma stack — already long SUNPHARMA + PHARMABEES; not adding EMCURE/SYNGENE. Cash ~51% post-NESTLEIND exit + ITC entry — adequate buffer into long weekend with VIX +10%."
}
